self_assessment.responsibilities: Lead the fakeGFP expression project (cloning, yeast transformation, qPCR validation). Maintain the lab's shared qPCR primer inventory and the fluorescence reader SOP. Mentor Remy on basic yeast culture during their rotation.

career_exploration.aspirations: Stay at the bench but move toward a role where I design the experiments and own the data story end to end. I am drawn to an industry scientist track at a synthetic-biology or therapeutics company, with a PI track as the open alternative if a strong postdoc fit appears.
career_exploration.target_path: Industry research scientist (synthetic biology), PI track as alternative

goals.text: Submit the fakeGFP expression manuscript as first author by Q1 2027
Draft Chapter 2 of the dissertation and pass the committee meeting this fall
Strengthen scientific writing by drafting one figure-and-legend per week
Build an industry network through two informational interviews and one conference

action_plan.objective: Complete the fakeGFP qPCR validation dataset
action_plan.approach: Run the 150 nM primer trial, lock the ACT1 reference, and finalize the three biological replicates
action_plan.outcome: Clean Cq dataset with SD under 0.15 across replicates, ready for the figure

action_plan.objective: Draft the manuscript methods and results sections
action_plan.approach: Write one subsection per week, review each with Mira at the weekly check-in
action_plan.outcome: A complete methods and results draft circulated to coauthors

action_plan.objective: Run two informational interviews with industry scientists
action_plan.approach: Reach out through the department alumni list and a conference contact
action_plan.outcome: Two interviews completed with notes on the day-to-day and hiring path

mentor_review.comment: Strong technical footing and the project ownership is exactly where I want a third-year to be. The honest read on writing is right, so we will make the weekly figure-and-legend habit the priority and I will turn around feedback within 72 hours. Let us revisit the industry-versus-PI question after the committee meeting, no need to decide now.

values_reflection.note: What keeps me here is building something real that other people can use, not the title. I want a group small enough that I still touch the data. I worry about whether I am fast enough at writing, and I do not want a job that is all grant deadlines and no bench.
